Title: Furîza no himitsu heiki! Akuma no Ginyû tokusentai
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Krillin reassures Bulma that Gohan has one of the dragon balls; the Ginyu Force is launched; as Yamcha, Piccolo, Tien, and Chiaotzu are training, King Kai senses the Ginyu Force; Goku keeps training at 100 times normal gravity; Go...
